backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining reflections, templates, portfolio items, and user profiles with access‑controlled CRUD query/update methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to affected frontend files, components, tests, and metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries for various frontend source files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration defining design tokens, light/dark theme values, and base styling.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Top-level React component handling authentication, page routing, and initial profile setup.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Layout wrapper providing header, navigation, footer, and link to the troubleshooting help dialog.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Unauthenticated landing screen with feature overview, Internet Identity login flow, link copying, and help dialog access.
frontend/src/components/HashtagEditor.ts: Allows adding and removing hashtags with input validation and badge display.
frontend/src/components/ImproveReflectio: Displays AI-generated reflection improvement suggestions with tabs and apply confirmation.
frontend/src/components/LinkedInSharePan: Generates LinkedIn post text, supports copying it and opening LinkedIn for sharing.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Handles Internet Identity login/logout with status handling and query cache reset.
frontend/src/components/PortfolioItemDet: Shows a portfolio item's poster preview, metadata, hashtags, and options to copy text or download the poster.
frontend/src/components/PosterPreview.ts: Renders a styled poster preview using reflection content, template image, and user attribution.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: Dialog prompting the user to enter and save their name for profile setup.
Displays selectable poster templates with image error handling and visual selection state.
frontend/src/components/TopNav.tsx: Navigation bar for switching pages and accessing the login button.
frontend/src/components/TroubleOpeningHe: A dialog component showing troubleshooting tips for connection issues, supporting controlled and uncontrolled open state.
React Query hooks to fetch portfolio items and generate posters, invalidating the portfolio cache on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/useReflection: React Query hooks for fetching, saving, and updating reflections with automatic cache invalidation.
Fetches templates from the backend or falls back to local metadata if none are available.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/useUserProfil: Hooks to fetch and save the current user profile, handling loading state and cache updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context with login, logout, status tracking, and stored identity restoration.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles and CSS variables defining theming for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/hashtags/generateHashta: Generates up to five hashtags from text using word frequency and fallback academic tags.
frontend/src/lib/poster/derivePosterCont: Builds a poster excerpt and attribution from reflection text and user profile.
frontend/src/lib/poster/downloadPosterPn: Renders a poster to canvas using template and reflection data, then downloads it as a PNG.
frontend/src/lib/reflection/improveRefle: Provides functions to rewrite reflection text for clarity, structure, and tone using simple text transformations.
frontend/src/lib/reflectionDraftStore.ts: Stores, loads, and clears reflection drafts in localStorage with basic error handling.
frontend/src/lib/sharing/linkedIn.ts: Builds LinkedIn post text from a reflection and opens the LinkedIn feed page for manual posting.
frontend/src/lib/templates/catalog.ts: Defines a static catalog of poster templates and provides lookup functions by ID.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentity providers before rendering App.
frontend/src/pages/GeneratorPage.tsx: UI for generating posters from reflections and templates, including hashtag generation, download, and saving to portfolio.
frontend/src/pages/PortfolioPage.tsx: Displays saved poster items and shows details for a selected portfolio entry.
Allows creating and editing reflections with autosave drafts and optional improvement suggestions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility helpers for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters for routing and persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind config enabling dark mode, custom color tokens, layout settings, animations, and typography/container/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing deployment issues, required assets, and feature requirements for the ReflectPoster app.
